summary: FieldFlow Pro v6.0 Features Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Attendance Dashboard, Cash Toggle, Cash/QR Ledger columns, Cash disabled worker visibility.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in worker rankings table - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Attendance system properly tracks punch-in/out with status transitions (NOT_STARTED → IN_PROGRESS → PRESENT)
Cash toggle endpoint properly validates worker role before toggling
Ledger API returns total_cash_collected and total_qr_collected fields
SaleCoupon page correctly hides Cash payment option when worker.cash_allowed=false
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: v6.0 Features fully tested. Key features: 1) Admin Attendance Dashboard at /api/attendance/admin/stats returns total_workers, present_today, absent_today, in_progress, total_hours_today. 2) Cash toggle at /api/admin/workers/{id}/toggle-cash toggles cash_allowed boolean. 3) Worker with cash_allowed=false only sees UPI/QR payment option in SaleCoupon page (no Cash button). 4) Ledger API at /api/ledgers/all returns total_cash_collected and total_qr_collected columns. 5) Static file serving at /api/uploads/{filename} returns 200 for existing files.

features_tested.attendance_stats_api: GET /api/attendance/admin/stats - returns total_workers, present_today, absent_today, in_progress, total_hours_today
features_tested.attendance_workers_api: GET /api/attendance/admin/workers - returns all workers with status (PRESENT, IN_PROGRESS, ABSENT)
features_tested.attendance_export_api: GET /api/attendance/admin/export - exports CSV with date range filter
features_tested.attendance_report_api: GET /api/attendance/admin/report - supports status and date_range filters
features_tested.worker_today_attendance: GET /api/attendance/today - worker sees their own status
features_tested.static_file_serving: GET /api/uploads/{filename} - returns 200 for existing files, 404 for missing
features_tested.worker_cash_visibility: Worker with cash_allowed=false only sees UPI/QR button in SaleCoupon page
features_tested.campaign_delete_api: DELETE /api/campaigns/{id} - succeeds for campaigns with no sold coupons

admin_workers_page.cash_column: Cash toggle buttons (ON/OFF) visible for each worker
admin_workers_page.cash_toggle_functionality: Clicking toggle updates cash_allowed in backend

worker_sale_coupon_page.payment_mode_cash_disabled: Only UPI/QR button visible when cash_allowed=false
worker_sale_coupon_page.cash_disabled_message: Shows 'Cash payments are disabled for your account. Please use QR/UPI only.'
